category_sources: Official Tailwind CSS IntelliSense repository README for the package says it is a Language Server Protocol implementation for Tailwind CSS.
display_name_sources: Official package README heading uses "Tailwind CSS Language Server".
docs_sources: Official package README is the project documentation surface and includes install/run usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/tailwindlabs/tailwindcss-intellisense; per instruction repo is returned as null when already supplied.
tags_sources: Official README identifies it as an LSP implementation for Tailwind CSS, with npm install and tailwindcss-language-server CLI usage.
